name: Pokémon
description: Monster-collecting RPG series built around catching, training, trading, and battling Pokémon across connected regions and generations.

eras.title: Game Boy Era
eras.description: The series establishes its core identity through Red, Blue, Yellow, Gold, Silver, and Crystal.

eras.title: Advance and DS Era
eras.description: Ruby, Sapphire, FireRed, LeafGreen, Diamond, Pearl, Black, and White expand the formula with abilities, remakes, online features, and stronger narrative structure.

eras.title: 3D and Mobile Era
eras.description: X and Y move the main series into 3D, while Pokémon Go becomes the franchise's major mobile breakthrough.

eras.title: Switch Era
eras.description: The series shifts to Nintendo Switch with larger-scale worlds, Legends experiments, and open-world mainline entries.
